meaning: vt.使怀孕,使受精,使充满,注入,灌输adj.怀孕的,充满的
examples: Norman's efforts to impregnate her failed.
What happens to the young girls these boys impregnate?
Or impregnate her, depending on which version you read.
Sumitomo had developed a chemical that you could impregnate into a polyethylene-based fiber.
Unless New Mexico intends to only prosecute accused rapists or practitioners of incest who impregnate their victims, the existence of a fetus is no evidence of rape or incest whatsoever.
